support.summary: No CEO-irreplaceable action; exec connect is a VP-level move on a $110k pipeline deal
support.detail: Norwegian Cruise Line ($110k, Formal Evaluation) has an Economic Buyer gap - no C-level or budget holder engaged, only mid-level recommenders Sandra Hill and Prince Bedell. The highest-leverage move is an executive briefing with the Chief Supply Chain Officer or CFO, but the pack explicitly assigns this to the owner's manager Alexa Bradley, not the CEO. No blocked discount, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or CEO-to-buyer-CEO peer relationship is at stake.
support.why_not_vp: Economic-buyer outreach and ROI alignment are standard manager/VP-led moves (Alexa Bradley); at $110k with no pricing veto or roadmap ask, nothing requires the CEO personally.

monitor.reason: Deal is active (4 days since last activity), not large (is_large=false) or forecasted, no our-side slip and no competitor edge in the last 14 days
